name: Frank Sinatra Jr.
description: American singer, composer, conductor and actor (1944–2016)
abstract: Francis Wayne Sinatra (; January 10, 1944 – March 16, 2016), known professionally as Frank Sinatra Jr., was an American jazz and big band singer, songwriter, conductor and actor. He was the second child and only son of singer and actor Frank Sinatra and his first wife, Nancy Barbato Sinatra, the younger brother of singer and actress Nanc…

The New York Pops 27th Birthday Gala Concert: The Best is Yet to Come: Celebrating the Legacy of Frank Sinatra

about_quotes.speaker: Fred Radke
about_quotes.evidence: I’m playing in the East Bay in a night club, and they were booking acts like Frank Sinatra Jr., Leslie Ugg — I mean Dorothy Dandridge
about_quotes.doc_title: Fred Radke interviewed by Monk Rowe, Hillsdale, Michigan, November 8, 2023
